ground_truth.title: Trending Books This Week | Penguin Random House
ground_truth.main_content: Discover the top trending books of this week from Penguin Random House. Featured titles include: A Marriage at Sea, The Midnight Library: A GMA Book Club Pick, Sparks Fly, The Eras Pour, What Does It Feel Like?, The Loneliness of Sonia and Sunny, The Italian Secret, Homeseeking: A GMA Book Club Pick, Stone Yard Devotional, Something Wicked. Penguin Random House makes it easy for you to discover your next great read.
with: We want to make it easy for you to discover your next great read.
Discover the top ten trending books of this week!
The Midnight Library: A GMA Book Club Pick
Homeseeking: A GMA Book Club Pick
without: Quiz: What Book Should You Read Next?
